---
title: java
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

******************************************************************************************

#### weblinks

******************************************************************************************

#### install


```sh
# install
brew tap caskroom/versions
brew cask install java8

# check version
java -version
which java
```


******************************************************************************************

#### R

```r
install.packages("rJava")
```

```sh
# reconfigue Java
R CMD javareconf # need to restart RStudio after this has run
```
